name: Workspaces
author: HypeShell Core
description: The workspace switcher and window manager status.

settings.label: Enabled
settings.description: Show the workspace switcher in the bar.

settings.label: Indicator Count
settings.description: Number of workspace dots to show.

settings.label: Show App Icons
settings.description: Show icons of open windows on the workspace dots.

settings.label: Japanese Numbers
settings.description: Use Japanese kanji for workspace numbers.
